inventoryMethod: Amount after valuation and LIFO reserves of inventory expected to be sold, or consumed within one year or operating cycle, if longer.
narrativeSnippets: Final price paid per share for the purchase of the targeted number of shares, determined by an average market price over a fixed period of time.
The price paid per share to immediately purchase the targeted number of shares on the date of executing the accelerated share repurchase agreement.
